zh.lifeSummary: 當Peter de Legh of Bechton於1294年出生在英國英格蘭爾巴可洛福 希爾時，他的父親John de Legh Venables I15歲，母親Elena de Baguley14歲。他於1318年與Ellen Bechton在英國英格蘭爾貝頓結婚。他們至少是2個女兒的父母。他去世於大約1360年在英國爾貝頓享年67歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Peter de Legh of Bechton于1294年出生在英国英格兰爾巴可洛福 希爾时，他的父亲John de Legh Venables I15岁，母亲Elena de Baguley14岁。他于1318年与Ellen Bechton在英国英格兰爾貝頓结婚。他们至少是2个女儿的父母。他去世于大约1360年在英国爾貝頓享年67岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Legh
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Leigh
meanings: English: habitational name from any of numerous places (in at least sixteen counties, but especially Leigh in Lancashire) named either with the nominative case of Old English lēah ‘woodland clearing’ (see Lee ) or with lēage, a late dative form of this word (see Lye ).
Chinese: variant Romanization of the surname 李, based on its Cantonese pronunciation. See   Li   1.

nameMeanings.name: Peter
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the name of the best-known of all Christ's apostles, traditionally regarded as the founder of the Christian Church. The name derives, via Latin, from Greek petros ‘stone, rock’. This is used as a translation of the Aramaic byname Cephas, given to the apostle Simon son of Jona, to distinguish him from another of the same name ( Simon Zelotes ). ‘When Jesus beheld him, he said, Thou art Simon the son of Jona: thou shalt be called Cephas, which is by interpretation, A stone’ (John 1:42). According to Matthew 16:17–18, Christ says more explicitly, ‘Blessed art thou, Simon Bar-jona … thou art Peter, and upon this rock I will build my church’. The name has been in continuous use since the Middle Ages.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Peter de Legh of Bechton was born in 1294, in Bucklow Hill, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, John de Legh Venables I, was 15 and his mother, Elena de Baguley, was 14. He married Ellen Bechton in 1318, in Bechton, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 daughters. He died about 1360, in Betchton, Cheshire, England, at the age of 67.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Peter de Legh of Bechton est né en 1294, à Bucklow Hill, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John de Legh Venables I, avait 15 ans et sa mère, Elena de Baguley, avait 14 ans. Il a épousé Ellen Bechton en 1318, à Bechton, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 filles. Il est décédé environ 1360, à Betchton, Cheshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 67 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Peter de Legh of Bechtonが1294年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアブックロウ ヒルで生まれた時，父John de Legh Venables Iは15歳，母Elena de Baguleyは14歳であった。1318年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアベチトンでEllen Bechtonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の娘の親であった。彼は約1360年にイギリスチェシュアイアベトチトンで67歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Peter de Legh of Bechton(이)가 1294년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 벅로 힐에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John de Legh Venables I(은)는 15세였고, 그의 어머니 Elena de Baguley(은)는 14세였다. 그는 1318년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 베튼에서 Ellen Bechton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1360년 영국 체실르 베트튼에서 67세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Peter de Legh of Bechton родился в 1294 г. в местности букклоу хилл, чешир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени John de Legh Venables I было 15 лет, а матери, которую звали Elena de Baguley, 14. Он женился на женщине по имени Ellen Bechton в 1318 г. в местности бечтон, чешир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 дочери. Он умер около 1360 г. в местности бечтон, чешир, Англия в возрасте 67 лет.
